jobs.title: Consumer
jobs.description: At Bessemer, we believe the future is built by creators, curators, community leaders, and co-owners. As commerce and communities transform on and off line, new distribution channels are emerging and our world is changing how we all connect, shop, and play. We back audacious founders, across internet marketplaces, gaming, creator tools, and more, enabling and empowering today’s hybrid reality. jobs.title: Cybersecurity
jobs.description: Cybersecurity is finally taking its rightful place at the center stage of the global business and geopolitical landscape. Investing in companies and the people building them
jobs.description: We care about and support founders as people — not just CEOs or business leaders. Because building a successful company requires more than performance at work.
